parameters.name: vdd
parameters.override_behavior: sets pulse and done high levels

parameters.name: vth
parameters.override_behavior: sets the threshold for clk, start, and every control-word bit

parameters.name: tr
parameters.override_behavior: sets rise and fall smoothing for pulse and done

modeling_constraints: AMS role: finite pulse-train sequencer for calibration, startup, and sampled-data control timing.
Use deterministic rising-edge clocked state for command capture and pulse sequencing.
Decode each four-bit control word as unsigned with bit 3 as the MSB and bit 0 as the LSB.
Do not add undeclared reset, debug, or validation-only ports or behavior.

properties.observable_contract: A sampled high start while idle captures unsigned period3:period0, width3:width0, and count3:count0 on a rising clk crossing.
A zero-coded period, width, or count is interpreted as one clock sample rather than zero.
Each accepted command emits exactly the captured count number of pulses.
Each pulse remains high for the captured width in clock samples and pulse starts are separated by the captured period in clock samples.
After the final pulse completes, pulse is low and done is asserted.
pulse and done use 0 V and vdd levels with finite transition smoothing set by tr.

title: Configurable Pulse Train Generator
